Figure 5: Example of Emotion State Identification (ESI).
Figure 6: Example of Emotion Transition Reasoning (ETR).

Table 3: Performance comparison of multimodal large language models on emotion dynamics tasks. ECD and ESI denote Emotion Change Detection and Emotion State Identification, respectively. Single and Multi refer to single-person and multiperson scenarios. For ESI, Partial Match measures whether at least one emotion state is correctly identified, while Exact Match requires both source and target emotions to be correctly predicted. All results are reported in Accuracy (%). Best and second-best results are highlighted in red and blue, respectively.
Figure 7: Example of Next Emotion Prediction (NEP).
